    CV

    Education

    • B.S. in GitHub, GitHub University, 2012
    • M.S. in Jekyll, GitHub University, 2014
    • Ph.D in Version Control Theory, GitHub University, 2018 (expected)

    Work experience

    • Summer 2015: Research Assistant
      • Github University
      • Duties included: Tagging issues
      • Supervisor: Professor Git
    • Fall 2015: Research Assistant
      • Github University
      • Duties included: Merging pull requests
      • Supervisor: Professor Hub

    Publications

    • Multi-sensors engagement detection with a robot companion in a home environment

      Wafa Benkaouar, Dominique Vaufreydaz, "Multi-sensors engagement detection with a robot companion in a home environment." In the proceedings of Workshop on Assistance and Service robotics in a human environment at IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS2012), 2012.

    • Acceptabilit'e d'un robot compagnon dans des situations de la vie quotidienne.

      Carole Adam, Wafa Johal, Ilef Ben, C{\'e}line Jost, Humbert Fiorono, Sylvie Pesty, Dominique Duhaut, "Acceptabilit&apos;e d&apos;un robot compagnon dans des situations de la vie quotidienne.." In the proceedings of Deuxi`eme conf&apos;erence III - Intercompr&apos;ehension de l&apos;intrasp&apos;ecifique `a l&apos;intersp&apos;ecifique, 2013.

    • Modelling interactions in a mixed agent world.

      Wafa Johal, Julie Dugdale, Sylvie Pesty, "Modelling interactions in a mixed agent world.." In the proceedings of European Modeling and Simulation Symposium, 2013.

    • A Robot with Style, because you are Worth it!

      Wafa Johal, Gaelle Calvary, Sylvie Pesty, "A Robot with Style, because you are Worth it!." In the proceedings of Proceedings of the extended abstracts of the 32nd annual ACM conference on Human factors in computing systems, 2014.

    • Acceptability of a companion robot for children in daily life situations

      Wafa Johal, Carole Adam, Humbert Fiorino, Sylvie Pesty, C{\'e}line Jost, Dominique Duhaut, "Acceptability of a companion robot for children in daily life situations." In the proceedings of 2014 5th IEEE Conference on Cognitive Infocommunications (CogInfoCom), 2014.

    • Expressing Parenting Styles with Companion Robots

      Wafa Johal, Sylvie Pesty, Ga{\"e}lle Calvary, "Expressing Parenting Styles with Companion Robots." In the proceedings of Workshop on Applications for Emotional Robots, Human Robot Interaction (HRI) 2014, 2014.

    • Towards companion robots behaving with style

      Wafa Johal, Sylvie Pesty, Gaelle Calvary, "Towards companion robots behaving with style." In the proceedings of The 23rd IEEE International Symposium on Robot and Human Interactive Communication, 2014.

    • A cognitive and affective architecture for social human-robot interaction

      Wafa Johal, Damien Pellier, Carole Adam, Humbert Fiorino, Sylvie Pesty, "A cognitive and affective architecture for social human-robot interaction." In the proceedings of Proceedings of the Tenth Annual ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction Extended Abstracts, 2015.

    • Non-verbal Signals in HRI: Interference in Human Perception

      Wafa Johal, Ga{\"e}lle Calvary, Sylvie Pesty, "Non-verbal Signals in HRI: Interference in Human Perception." In the proceedings of International Conference on Social Robotics, 2015.

    • Robots Interacting with Style

      Wafa Johal, "Robots Interacting with Style." In the proceedings of Proceedings of the Tenth Annual ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction Extended Abstracts, 2015.

    • The Grenoble system for the social touch challenge at ICMI 2015

      Viet-Cuong Ta, Wafa Johal, Maxime Portaz, Eric Castelli, Dominique Vaufreydaz, "The Grenoble system for the social touch challenge at ICMI 2015." In the proceedings of Proceedings of the 2015 ACM on International Conference on Multimodal Interaction, 2015.

      Wafa Johal, Alexis Jacq, Ana Paiva, Pierre Dillenbourg, "Child-robot spatial arrangement in a learning by teaching activity." In the proceedings of 2016 25th IEEE International Symposium on Robot and Human Interactive Communication (RO-MAN), 2016.

    • Social human-robot interaction: A new cognitive and affective interaction-oriented architecture

      Carole Adam, Wafa Johal, Damien Pellier, Humbert Fiorino, Sylvie Pesty, "Social human-robot interaction: A new cognitive and affective interaction-oriented architecture." In the proceedings of International conference on social robotics, 2016.

    • Cellulo: Versatile handheld robots for education

In the proceedings of 2017 12th ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction (HRI, 2017.

    • Keep on moving! Exploring anthropomorphic effects of motion during idle moments

      Thibault Asselborn, Wafa Johal, Pierre Dillenbourg, "Keep on moving! Exploring anthropomorphic effects of motion during idle moments." In the proceedings of 2017 26th IEEE International Symposium on Robot and Human Interactive Communication (RO-MAN), 2017.
